games.explanation: CHC is the better team by Elo and the sim confirms it — the market isn't giving them enough credit. Edward Cabrera toes the rubber against Kodai Senga. CHC holds a commanding 136-point Elo edge.
The market has WSN as a +136 underdog, but our simulation disagrees. Zack Littell keeps WSN competitive on the mound against Logan Webb. WSN holds a commanding 112-point Elo edge.
STL is getting plus-money at +119 and the model thinks that's too cheap. Kyle Leahy keeps STL competitive on the mound against Peter Lambert. STL holds a commanding 148-point Elo edge.

SDP is getting plus-money at +117 and the model thinks that's too cheap. Matt Waldron keeps SDP competitive on the mound against Jose Soriano. The sim projects SDP to plate 5.3 runs — expect some fireworks.

Athletics is the better team by Elo and the sim confirms it — the market isn't giving them enough credit. Aaron Civale is a big pitching edge over Davis Martin. Athletics holds a commanding 179-point Elo edge.
